_comment: JPRICE key (set/number, or set/number/name for vintage cards) -> snkrdunk trading-card ID. URL = https://snkrdunk.com/en/trading-cards/<id>. snkrdunk gives an SGD market price (raw/ungraded only, no graded). IDs are not derivable, so add them as you collect snkrdunk links. Cards without an ID here keep their current JPRICE + the live link.
